name: Maple Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart saucepan over very low heat, heat sugars, undiluted milk, and corn syrup to boiling, stirring constantly.
2. Set candy thermometer in place and continue cooking, stirring constantly, until the temperature reaches 235°F or until a small amount of mixture dropped into very cold water forms a soft ball (about 30 minutes).
3. Remove candy mixture from heat. With a spoon, beat butter, maple flavor, and nuts into the mixture.
4. Drop mixture by teaspoonfuls onto waxed paper; cool on wire racks.
Makes 24 pieces or 3/4 pound.
117 calories each serving.
